hero.headline: A Slice Above
hero.subtext: Premium Italian dining and fast takeaway across Wiltshire. Stone-baked pizzas, handmade pasta, and Italian warmth since 2009.

loyalty.heading: Earn Rewards Every Time You Order
loyalty.body: Every order in-store, online or via our app earns you points. Redeem them for free sides, pizzas and exclusive rewards. The more you enjoy, the more you get back.

crossBrand.heading: Explore More from Zia
crossBrand.body: Zia Pizza is part of the ZIA Hospitality Group — a family of restaurants and gastro pubs across the South West. Discover our sister venues for relaxed lunches, weekend roasts and local craft beer.

about.headline: A Family Recipe, Rooted in Wiltshire
about.body: Zia Pizza began in a sunlit Naples kitchen and found its home in the heart of Wiltshire. Every pizza is hand-stretched, slow-proofed and stone-baked — the way Zia Maria taught us. What started as a single restaurant in Salisbury is now a small family of venues, each run with the same obsession over dough, ingredients and hospitality.

footer.legal: Zia Pizza is part of ZIA Hospitality Group Ltd.
footer.tagline: More than a restaurant — it's a legacy of love, stone, and flavour.
